demo.subtitle: Upload a contract and watch Judite identify abusive clauses, verify compliance and deliver ready-to-use negotiation recommendations.
demo.alertDoNotSign: Alert: DO NOT SIGN at this time
demo.alertItem2: Violates mandatory provisions of the FTC Act on unfair terms
demo.alertItem3: Fails to meet GDPR/CCPA data processing requirements
demo.roadmapItem1: Request the full version with pre-filled scope and financial values.
demo.roadmapItem2: Immediately renegotiate clauses 5, 6 and 7 on Unilateral Termination.

features.sectionSubtitle: Risk analysis, document generation, court research — all integrated via WhatsApp, Telegram or web platform. Judite works silently so you can focus on strategy.
features.riskAnalysisDesc: Upload any contract — PDF, Word or snap a photo from your phone. Judite identifies abusive clauses, hidden penalties and invisible risks in seconds.
features.expertModeDesc: Activate the premium AI engine for deeper analysis — with detailed legal reasoning, GDPR/CCPA compliance checklist and negotiation recommendations. Your default mode keeps working normally.
features.photoReadingDesc: Take a photo of the contract on your desk and send it via WhatsApp or Telegram. Judite automatically extracts the text and analyzes it instantly — no scanner needed.
features.docGenerationDesc: Ask Judite to create contracts, terms, power of attorney or any legal document from scratch. She drafts with precise legal language and delivers in editable PDF or Word.
features.voiceChatDesc: Send a voice message on WhatsApp or Telegram and Judite responds by voice. Request analyses, adjustments and she sends the formatted PDF directly in chat — no website needed.
features.audioDesc: Contract risk audit delivered directly on WhatsApp.
features.siloDesc: Files run in encrypted silos with government-grade RLS. Besides never using data to train AI, Judite creates on-chain integrity seals for every analysis on the Solana blockchain.
features.govDesc: Direct access to Brazil's Supreme Court, Congress, Central Bank, DataJud and 36+ government APIs. Plus US Federal Reserve (FRED), FDIC, Census Bureau, Bureau of Labor Statistics, US case law (CourtListener), federal regulations (eCFR), Federal Register and European legislation (EUR-Lex/GDPR) — all through natural conversation.

ecosystem.subtitle: Judite is not a generic chatbot. She is a bench of specialized AIs that coordinate to solve complex legal problems.
ecosystem.orchestratorDesc: Judite acts as the Master Builder. She doesn't operate in isolation, autonomously distributing the processing load to other agents and recruiting the most qualified LLM model on demand for each task.
ecosystem.probeDesc: The AI cross-references violations with dozens of simultaneous public APIs — scanning the Supreme Court, Central Bank and Official Gazette in real time.
ecosystem.arsenalDesc: Armed with hundreds of tools, she navigates the internet, packages legal PDFs and dispatches formatted documents directly to the portal.
ecosystem.siloDesc: The database locks each file asymmetrically. Judite has blind access: no corporate contract is used to train the LLMs.
ecosystem.complianceBenchDesc: An autonomous commission of specialized agents audits every document before delivery. Multi-jurisdictional compliance: OAB/LGPD (BR), ABA/CCPA (US) and GDPR/ePrivacy (EU).

It does not replace the work of a licensed attorney, nor does it constitute legal advice or consulting services. All reports, documents, and materials generated on the platform must be reviewed, validated and are the sole responsibility of the legal professional before any filing or final use. Results may vary depending on document type, request complexity and analysis mode (Fast or Expert).

verify.title: Integrity Verification
verify.subtitle: This legal analysis was recorded on the blockchain and can be publicly verified.
verify.verifiedDesc: The stored content perfectly matches the hash recorded on the Solana blockchain.
verify.mismatchDesc: The stored content does not match the hash recorded on the blockchain.
verify.notFoundDesc: Could not locate an analysis associated with this blockchain transaction.
verify.manualDesc: Paste the original Markdown text to compare manually.
verify.manualWarning: Paste the original Markdown text (as stored in the database), not text copied from a rendered PDF.
verify.manualPlaceholder: Paste the original Markdown analysis text here...
verify.step1: Click "Download Original Document" to get the exact text that was notarized.
verify.step2_1: Calculate the SHA-256 of the downloaded file using any tool:
verify.step3: Compare the calculated hash with the On-Chain Hash displayed above.
verify.step4: Verify on Solscan Explorer that the transaction contains the same hash.
verify.stepFooter: If the hashes match perfectly, the document is authentic and has not been altered since the date it was recorded on the blockchain. Any modification, however small, generates a completely different hash.
verify.importantInfo: ⚠️ Important: Paste the original Markdown text (as stored in the database), not text copied from a rendered PDF. The PDF formatting differs from Markdown and will produce a different hash.

guide.title: Usage Guide
guide.subtitle: Everything you need to know to get the most out of your smart legal assistant.
guide.startWeb2: Click Start for Free and create your account
guide.startWeb3: In the dashboard, go to Settings → Generate Link Code and connect Telegram or WhatsApp in 1 click
guide.startMsg1: If you already have an account, go to @JuditeAI_bot on Telegram or send a message on WhatsApp
guide.startMsg2: Send vincular_ followed by the 6-digit PIN from the dashboard
guide.pocketDesc: Judite works in three complementary environments. Use each one for what it does best:
guide.waDesc: The most practical channel. Chat via text or voice, send documents, receive PDFs, and check official data — all through the app you already use.
guide.wa3: ✅ Receive PDFs directly in the chat
guide.tgDesc: More fluid for large files. Chat via text or voice, send documents directly from your phone, take photos of contracts, and receive PDFs in the chat.
guide.webDesc: Your digital office. Manage organized documents, track credits, configure Expert Mode, and access your collection at any time.
guide.syncAlert: 💡 Everything synced: Documents saved via WhatsApp or Telegram appear in the dashboard. Documents sent via the dashboard can be analyzed by Judite in messengers. Your account is unique — access it from anywhere.
guide.chatDesc: Judite understands natural language. Write as if you were talking to a fellow lawyer:
guide.chatQ1: What is the statute of limitations for breach of contract in California?
guide.chatQ2: Explain the doctrine of promissory estoppel
guide.chatQ3: Is this 50% early termination fee enforceable under the UCC?
guide.chatQ5: Draft an NDA for a SaaS partnership
guide.voiceAlert: 🎤 Send voice messages via WhatsApp or Telegram — Judite understands and can reply by voice! (Pro Plan)
guide.docDesc: Send contracts in PDF, Word, or take a photo. Judite identifies risks automatically.
guide.docFormat: Accepted formats: PDF, DOCX, TXT, MD. Document photos available on the Pro plan.
guide.govDesc: Direct access to 45+ official APIs across 3 jurisdictions. Brazilian, American and European government data in real time.
guide.govQ1: What is the current Fed Funds rate?
guide.govQ2: Search for breach of contract cases in the 9th Circuit
guide.govQ3: Look up recent FDIC enforcement actions
guide.govQ4: Find CCPA-related rulings in the Federal Register
guide.govQ5: Look up company EIN or SEC filing
guide.govQ6: Search GDPR enforcement decisions on data transfers
guide.govQ7: Were there any updates to the FTC Act in 2025?
guide.govQ8: Search for case No. 23-cv-01234 in PACER
guide.govAlert: ⚡ Simple queries (Fed rate, EIN, Zip Code) are instantaneous — no extra AI cost.
guide.expertDesc: Enable in the Dashboard Settings for analyses with Judite's exclusive premium AI engine. Includes detailed legal reasoning, in-depth GDPR/CCPA/FTC compliance checklist, and negotiation recommendations.
guide.expertAlert: ⚠️ Expert Mode consumes more credits per interaction. Available on the Pro plan.
guide.tip1D: Instead of "help me with a contract", say "analyze the abusive clauses of this lease agreement".
guide.tip2D: After any search, ask "generate a PDF of this" and receive it in the chat.
guide.tip3D: Send audio when you are busy — Judite understands and replies.
guide.tip4D: Judite automatically cross-references official government data with the internet.
guide.tip5D: Judite remembers the conversation. Say "adjust clause 3" without repeating everything.
guide.disclaimer: ⚖️ Judite is an Artificial Intelligence-based tool to support legal drafting and analysis. It does not replace the work of a licensed attorney. All generated documents must be reviewed by a qualified legal professional before any final use.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy | Judite AI
privacy.description: Privacy Policy and data usage for Judite AI.
privacy.s1Text: Judite AI is committed to protecting the privacy and security of its users' data, especially considering the sensitive and confidential nature of legal information. This policy explains how we collect, use, store, and protect your data.
privacy.s2Li1Text: Name, email, phone, and company/firm name (optional).
privacy.s2Li2Text: Integration IDs via messengers (like Telegram) for account linking.
privacy.s2Li3Text: PDFs and images sent for extraction and analysis.
privacy.s3Text: Files (such as contracts and images) sent to Judite AI are processed using artificial intelligence infrastructure providers (LLMaaS) acting strictly as Data Processors, solely and exclusively to perform the analyses requested by the user.
privacy.s3BoxText: The data extracted from your corporate and legal documents are not used to train or improve public foundational AI models. Processing occurs via corporate APIs with strict Data Processing Agreements (DPA).
privacy.s4Text: Your registration data is stored in secure infrastructure managed by Supabase. Regarding processed documents:
privacy.s4Li1: Temporary files, such as photos sent via chat, are not permanently stored on our database servers; their content remains temporarily in memory for analysis and is subsequently discarded.
privacy.s4Li2: PDFs generated or analyzed in the Dashboard are linked to your account with strict Row Level Security (RLS) rules, accessible only by you.
privacy.s5Text1: We do not store complete credit card data. Our payments are processed by
privacy.s5Text3: , a leading global payment infrastructure provider, ensuring full compliance with PCI security standards.
privacy.s6Text: If you have questions about this privacy policy or the data stored in your account, you can contact our data protection officer via email:

terms.title: Terms of Use | Judite AI
terms.description: Terms of Use and disclaimer for Judite AI.
terms.s1BoxText1: Judite AI is a technological support tool developed to assist the legal workflow through Large Language Models (LLM).
terms.s1BoxText2: JUDITE AI DOES NOT REPLACE A LAWYER. The tool does not provide legal advice, nor does it possess the capability or professional registration to guarantee infallible technical-legal accuracy. All generated documents, petitions, and analyses may contain mathematical or textual hallucinations (AI-generated fabrications). It is the exclusive duty of the legal operator to review, validate, and sign the produced content. Judite AI is not responsible for procedural losses.
terms.s2Text: You agree to use Judite AI only for lawful and ethical purposes. It is prohibited to:
terms.s2Li1: Attempt to bypass the chatbot's credit system (Telegram) or OCR limits.
terms.s2Li2: Inject malware disguised as PDFs to compromise the platform.
terms.s2Li3: Perform scraping, reverse engineering, or abuse of the system's webhooks.
terms.s2Li4: Actively resell Judite's service hiding its authorship, without official partnerships (white-label).
terms.s3Text: Judite AI operates in a SaaS model through credits and daily request limits.
terms.s3Li1Text: Pro Plan requests and actions (PDFs, OCR, messages) are renewed daily automatically. Unused limits do not roll over.
terms.s3Li2Text: The user may request cancellation directly in the
terms.s3Li2Text2: at any time. Upon cancellation, continuous proportional access will be maintained until the end of the current billing cycle. After its expiration, the account will return to the Free plan limits.
terms.s3Li3Text: As a cloud-processed software with high GPU consumption, we do not issue refunds for periods that have already begun, except in cases of proven critical service failures.
terms.s4Text: Judite AI may suspend, temporarily remove limits, or permanently ban accounts (including Pro) without prior notice if we detect intentional leakage of keys, automated abuse that overloads our GPU, or serious offenses/violations involving the tool.
terms.s5Text: These Terms shall be governed by the laws of the Federative Republic of Brazil, and the courts in the city of the company's domicile are elected to resolve any conflicts.

about.title: About Judite AI
about.description: Learn about the history and purpose behind Judite AI.
about.subtitle: Democratizing and accelerating complex analyses in Law through Artificial Intelligence.
about.missionP1: Modern law practice demands speed, but technical rigor can never be set aside. We know how exhausting it is to spend hours reading lengthy contracts, sorting case law, or formulating the same pattern of legal documents over and over.
about.missionP2: That is why we created Judite AI.
about.missionP3: Our mission is not to replace the lawyer — after all, critical thinking, strategy, and human empathy are irreplaceable and inherent to the profession. We built Judite to expand your capabilities, serving as a dedicated virtual assistant that extracts information, points out weaknesses in contracts, and answers questions instantly via WhatsApp and Telegram.
about.why1Text: Your PDFs and documents are processed temporarily under strict confidentiality. We do not use client data to train AIs (standard opt-out for LLM models).
about.why2Text: AI shouldn't require you to learn dozens of confusing prompts. With Judite, just send an audio or photo on your phone and she responds contextually.
